title: • SHEEN goes missing
content:
• SHEEN goes missing
  • SHEEN is found dead (by L?).
  • L sees that same car around town, and starts to follow it.
  • Where next? How could L be of any help in this instance? She begins to investigate the neighbors.
  • The investigation leads nowhere, besides self discovery for L.

    • EL is not physically mute, just chooses to be. The second act is dedicated to EL? The third act

    EL creates a questionnaire that she uses when talking to the suspects.

    “I am conducting a series of interviews with the neighbors in our complex. I have my suspicions that Sheen’s death was a murder. Any information you can give me would really be helpful as I piece the mystery together to find out the truth about what happened that night.”
    • What is your cellphone number? NOTE: Please read it nice and slowly so I have a moment to type it into my phone.
    • Would you mind if I recorded this interview?
    • You know who this person is, correct? (PICTURE of SHEEN)
    • Do you remember what you were doing the night of Sheen’s alleged accidental suicide? And do you remember anything weird taking place that night?
